column3: Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisly and consistantly when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using in the specified output format, without labeling it as output format:, after review through the following steps. 1. Identify the organization who wrote this document. 2. Select one category from  CATEGORY LIST provided below. If the provided category list does not provide a strong match display the word 'Other'. Output format template: 'category (Name of the firm/company/ the person who requested the document/the date of request if its requestd by a patient)'. Ensure this output format template is followed precisly including brackets (), and the output must end without a period. For reference this is an example using this output template 'Request Records (Sharma Law Firm),Attending physician’s statement (Spector Lit Law Firm), Request Record by patient (04 April 2021) '. CATEGORY LIST: Prior Authorization, Attending physician’s statement, Request Records, Request Record by patient
